translations.en: I’d like to rent out the room.
translations.fr: Je veux mettre la chambre en location.
translations.pt: Quero colocar o quarto para alugar.
translations.hi: मैं कमरा किराए पर देना चाहती हूँ।
translations.ro: Vreau să dau camera în chirie.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; syntactic subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (Konjunktiv II of ‘mögen’), 1st person singular present; expresses desire/politeness and selects the bare infinitive ‘vermieten’.
Definite article, neuter accusative singular; determiner of ‘Zimmer’, marks the direct object.
Common noun, neuter accusative singular; direct object of the lexical verb ‘vermieten’.
Main verb in infinitive; non-separable prefix verb (ver-); lexical complement of the modal ‘möchte’ placed clause-final.

sentences.target: Meine Eltern wollen den Keller vermieten.

translations.de: Meine Eltern wollen den Keller vermieten.
translations.en: My parents want to rent out the basement.
translations.es: Mis padres quieren alquilar el sótano.
translations.fr: Mes parents veulent mettre le sous-sol en location.
translations.it: I miei genitori vogliono affittare il seminterrato.
translations.ko: 우리 부모님은 지하실을 내놓고 싶어 하세요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我父母想把地下室出租。
translations.pt: Meus pais querem colocar o porão para alugar.
translations.he: ההורים שלי רוצים להשכיר את המרתף.
translations.vi: Ba mẹ tôi muốn cho thuê tầng hầm.
translations.nl: Mijn ouders willen de kelder verhuren.
translations.hu: A szüleim szeretnék kiadni a pincét.
translations.hi: मेरे माता-पिता तहखाना किराए पर देना चाहते हैं।
translations.el: Οι γονείς μου θέλουν να νοικιάσουν το υπόγειο.
translations.nb: Foreldrene mine vil leie ut kjelleren.
translations.id: Orang tua saya ingin menyewakan ruang bawah tanah.
translations.sv: Mina föräldrar vill hyra ut källaren.
translations.ro: Părinții mei vor să dea subsolul în chirie.
translations.ja: 両親は地下室を貸したいです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, nominative plural; agrees with ‘Eltern’ and marks possession.
Plural-only common noun, nominative plural; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, 3rd person plural present; expresses intention and selects the infinitive ‘vermieten’.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner of ‘Keller’, marks the direct object.
Common noun, masculine accusative singular; direct object of ‘vermieten’.
Main verb in infinitive; non-separable prefix verb; lexical complement of the modal ‘wollen’.

sentences.target: Wir möchten die Wohnung ab Mai vermieten.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈmœçtən diː ˈvoːnʊŋ ap maɪ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈmiːtən/

translations.de: Wir möchten die Wohnung ab Mai vermieten.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈmœçtən diː ˈvoːnʊŋ ap maɪ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈmiːtən/
translations.en: We would like to rent out the apartment from May.
translations.es: Queremos alquilar el apartamento desde mayo.
translations.fr: Nous voulons mettre l'appartement en location à partir de mai.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们想从五月起把这套公寓出租。
translations.yue: 我哋想由五月開始放租個單位。
translations.ru: Мы хотим сдавать квартиру с мая.
translations.pt: Queremos colocar o apartamento para alugar a partir de maio.
translations.he: אנחנו רוצים להשכיר את הדירה ממאי.
translations.tr: Daireyi Mayıs'tan itibaren kiraya vermek istiyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi muốn cho thuê căn hộ từ tháng Năm.
translations.ar: نريد تأجير الشقة ابتداءً من مايو.
translations.nl: We willen het appartement vanaf mei verhuren.
translations.uk: Ми хочемо здавати квартиру з травня.
translations.hi: हम मई से फ्लैट किराए पर देना चाहते हैं।
translations.el: Θέλουμε να νοικιάσουμε το διαμέρισμα από τον Μάιο.
translations.nb: Vi vil leie ut leiligheten fra mai.
translations.id: Kami ingin menyewakan apartemen mulai bulan Mei.
translations.sv: Vi vill hyra ut lägenheten från maj.
translations.ro: Vrem să dăm apartamentul în chirie din mai.
translations.da: Vi vil udleje lejligheden fra maj.
translations.fi: Haluamme laittaa asunnon vuokralle toukokuusta alkaen.
translations.ja: 私たちは5月からアパートを貸したいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (Konjunktiv II of ‘mögen’), 1st person plural present; selects the bare infinitive ‘vermieten’.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of ‘Wohnung’, marks the direct object.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of ‘vermieten’.
Preposition governing the dative; temporal marker meaning ‘starting from’; introduces the adjunct ‘ab Mai’.
Proper noun (month), dative singular without article; object of the preposition ‘ab’ specifying the temporal starting point.
Main verb in infinitive; non-separable prefix verb; lexical complement of the modal ‘möchten’, placed clause-final.

sentences.target: Der Nachbar will seine Garage vermieten.

translations.de: Der Nachbar will seine Garage vermieten.
translations.en: The neighbor wants to rent out his garage.
translations.es: El vecino quiere alquilar su garaje.
translations.fr: Le voisin veut mettre son garage en location.
translations.it: Il vicino vuole affittare il suo garage.
translations.ko: 이웃은 자기 차고를 내놓고 싶어 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 邻居想把他的车库出租。
translations.pt: O vizinho quer colocar a garagem dele para alugar.
translations.he: השכן רוצה להשכיר את המוסך שלו.
translations.vi: Người hàng xóm muốn cho thuê gara của anh ấy.
translations.nl: De buurman wil zijn garage verhuren.
translations.hu: A szomszéd szeretné kiadni a garázsát.
translations.hi: पड़ोसी अपना गैराज किराए पर देना चाहता है।
translations.el: Ο γείτονας θέλει να νοικιάσει το γκαράζ του.
translations.nb: Naboen vil leie ut garasjen sin.
translations.sv: Grannen vill hyra ut sitt garage.
translations.ro: Vecinul vrea să dea garajul în chirie.
translations.ja: 隣の人はガレージを貸したいです。

Main verb in infinitive; non-separable prefix verb; lexical complement of the modal ‘will’.
